note: Full-history Claude snapshot from the Logpile session ledger's native (deduplicated) daily columns after its 2026-07-11 adversarial accounting review. The merge rule keeps, per (day, model), whichever of {disk scan, this seed} carries more tokens: the live scan wins on recent days (it also counts private sessions the ledger excludes), the seed wins on days whose transcripts rotated before the scan cache existed (~< 2026-06-10). Vectors are [fresh_input, cache_creation, cache_read, output] per day/model/origin; cache-creation has no 5m/1h split in the ledger and is priced at the 5m rate. Generated 2026-07-12; cutoff = generation watermark.
